name: Soupe De Saumon a La Creme from the Chaparral
recipeIngredient: 1 lb fish bones of white-fleshed fish
recipeInstructions:
1. To make fish stock: Simmer all ingredients for fish stock for approximately 45 minutes.
2. Strain through cheesecloth.
3. For soup: Bring 1 quart fish stock to boil. Reduce heat and add the salmon. Simmer 5 min. Remove from heat.
4. Gently stir in the cream. Place in a soup tureen or individual bowls. Sprinkle with dill.
Preparation: simmer
Cuisine: French
Source: The Chaparral Food Group:
Seafood Meals: lunch, dinner
Courses: Soup
Temperature: hot
